Event: Titanic Excavation - Feb 2025

Sage Bot Item Code: RI145
Astral message Ring

When an enemy uses a weapon, armor, or artifact ability, removes 2 random shields or damage-reducing effects, and deals 176000 physical damage to that enemy. The ability triggers up to once per 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
